subcodes.first_line: Dear sister, beloved of my heart and soul! The news of thy safe arrival and pleasant stay in the land of Egypt has reached me
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شقیقه روحی و فوادی خبر وصول بمصر و حصول راحت سر رسید نهایت روح و ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort
